docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-14-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-14-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JOSHUA DUMAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE GRIGALVA IS PRESENT. NO POROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2017 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUMAS, JOSHUA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRIGALVA, JOSE $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DUMAS, JOSHUA AS TO DEFENDANT GRIGALVA, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2017 - CONTINUED TO JUN-14-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
